channel.title: CyberNetSec - Regulatory
channel.description: Latest regulatory threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: CISA and Partners Release Joint Guidance for Applying Zero Trust Principles to OT Environments
item.description:
The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA), in partnership with the Department of War, DOE, FBI, and DOS, has published a comprehensive guide for implementing Zero Trust security principles within Operational Technology (OT) environments. The guidance provides a roadmap for sec...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Industrial Control Systems, Regulatory

Read Full Article →

item.title: Europol Warns of AI-Powered 'Industrialized Cybercrime' in IOCTA 2026 Report
item.description:
Europol's 2026 Internet Organised Crime Threat Assessment (IOCTA) highlights a major shift towards the 'industrialization' of cybercrime, significantly accelerated by the use of Artificial Intelligence. The report states that AI is being used to increase the scale, speed, and efficiency of attacks. ...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →

item.title: Singapore Plans Major Cybersecurity Overhaul, Mandating PQC and Expanding CII Oversight
item.description:
Singapore is set to significantly strengthen its national cybersecurity posture with a series of regulatory updates announced by the government. The changes, to be rolled out over the next two years, will expand cybersecurity obligations to systems connected to Critical Information Infrastructure (C...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →

item.title: State CISO Confidence Plummets as AI Threats Rise and Budgets Fall, Survey Finds
item.description:
Confidence among U.S. state chief information security officers (CISOs) has dropped dramatically, according to the 2026 NASCIO-Deloitte Cybersecurity Study. Only 26% of state CISOs feel 'extremely' or 'very' confident in their ability to protect state systems, a steep decline from 48% in 2022. The p...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →

item.title: US Cracks Down on Southeast Asia Cyberscam Networks, Sanctions Cambodian Senator
item.description:
The U.S. government has launched a major, multi-agency crackdown on transnational cyberscam networks operating from Southeast Asia. The initiative, described as a 'new theater of war' against Chinese organized crime, involves sanctions, criminal charges, and asset seizures. The U.S. Treasury has san...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory, Phishing

Read Full Article →

item.title: US Treasury Sanctions Crypto Exchange and Mixers for Laundering Ransomware Proceeds
item.description:
The U.S. Department of the Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) has taken decisive action against the financial infrastructure supporting cybercrime by sanctioning a virtual currency exchange, 'Cortexchange', and two cryptocurrency mixing services, 'ChainScrub' and 'HelixMix'. These en...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory, Ransomware

Read Full Article →

item.title: Indian Finance Minister Warns of AI-Driven Cyberattacks and Deepfakes Threatening Financial Markets
item.description:
At the 38th Foundation Day of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI), Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman delivered a stark warning about the growing threat of sophisticated cyberattacks on India's financial markets. She highlighted the risks posed by AI-led attacks, deepfake videos...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory

Read Full Article →

item.title: Cherokee Federal Achieves CMMC Level 2 Certification, Preparing for Upcoming DoD Contract Requirements
item.description:
Cherokee Federal, the federal contracting division of Cherokee Nation Businesses, has successfully achieved Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) Level 2. This critical certification, which is aligned with NIST SP 800-171, validates the company's implementation of 110 rigorous security c...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory

Read Full Article →

item.title: Celerium Launches 'DIB CyberDome' to Automate CMMC Compliance for Defense SMBs
item.description:
Celerium has launched the DIB CyberDome, a cybersecurity platform tailored for the thousands of small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs) in the U.S. Defense Industrial Base (DIB). The platform is designed to help these contractors meet the complex requirements of the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certif...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Security Operations, Regulatory

Read Full Article →

item.title: ENISA Updates Framework for National Cybersecurity Assessment
item.description:
The European Union Agency for Cybersecurity (ENISA) has released version 2.0 of its National Capabilities Assessment Framework (NCAF). The updated framework and online tool provide a methodology for EU member states to assess the maturity of their National Cybersecurity Strategies (NCSS). Aligned wi...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory, Security Operations

Read Full Article →
